visa_types.name: QATAR
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Certificate
- Passport copy
- Supporting documents will be required during the attestation process
visa_types.overview:
Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.

## Documents Required
- Original Certificate
- Passport copy
- Supporting documents will be required during the attestation process

## Attestation Process
- Ministry of Education (EDUCATIONAL)
- Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Qatar
- Oman Embassy in Qatar
- Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Oman
- UAE Embassy in Oman
- MOFA UAE

## Download Forms
Declaration & disclaimers (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/wg8vp553NyHVf010rn4O8/d959eb5ec41b4184a57a1c7f5b4f54e6/declaration-from-attestation.pdf)

## Overview
EDUCATIONAL DOCUMENT- Diploma Certificates, Transcripts, Confirmation Letter, Master’s Degree, Doctorate Degree etc.
PERSONAL DOCUMENT- Birth Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate, Police clearances, Medical certificates etc.

- Passport copy
